mvp_goal: Prove that MENA art buyers will pay for curated, locally-delivered art supplies from verified sellers on a simple marketplace — before building any community or premium features.

riskiest_assumptions.assumption: MENA art buyers will pay a 12% premium for verified local curation over cheaper unverified alternatives
riskiest_assumptions.validation_method: Run 20 WhatsApp conversations asking buyers to complete a real purchase. Target: 5+ completed orders in week 1.
riskiest_assumptions.kill_signal: Fewer than 3 completed orders after 30 outreach conversations

riskiest_assumptions.assumption: Local art supply sellers in MENA are willing to onboard onto a curated platform and meet quality standards
riskiest_assumptions.validation_method: Contact 20 local sellers via Instagram DM. Target: 5 express serious interest and submit the Typeform application.
riskiest_assumptions.kill_signal: Fewer than 3 seller applications after 20 outreach attempts

riskiest_assumptions.assumption: Buyers in Egypt and KSA will complete checkout using local payment methods (Fawry, Mada) on an unfamiliar platform
riskiest_assumptions.validation_method: Simulate a real purchase with 5 willing buyers. Measure drop-off at payment step.
riskiest_assumptions.kill_signal: More than 60% of buyers abandon at payment — indicates payment method mismatch

included: Secure checkout with Stripe (cards) and Fawry/Paymob (local)
Seller onboarding via Typeform + manual verification by founder
Order status notifications via WhatsApp Business
Basic seller analytics via Sharetribe dashboard
excluded: Creator community profiles and following — wait for 200 active buyers
Peer critique circles — wait for 50 active creator profiles
Monthly subscription box — wait for month 4+ and $10K GMV
B2B school supply channel — year 2 feature
Mobile app — web-optimised Sharetribe is sufficient for 18 months
Custom chat system — WhatsApp handles all communication needs
AI-powered product recommendations — requires significant data first

core_user_flows.name: Buyer discovery and purchase
steps: Buyer discovers platform via Instagram post or university referral
Browses curated catalogue filtered by medium (watercolour, oil, etc.)
Reads verified seller profile and product reviews
Adds item to cart and selects local payment method
Seller fulfils order; buyer gets delivery status updates via WhatsApp
core_user_flows.success_metric: Order completed end-to-end in under 10 minutes from landing

core_user_flows.name: Seller onboarding
steps: Seller discovers platform via DM outreach or word of mouth
Completes Typeform application with product samples and business details
Founder reviews within 48 hours, approves or requests changes
Seller receives Sharetribe login and Verified badge
Seller lists first 5 products with founder guidance via WhatsApp
core_user_flows.success_metric: Seller goes from application to first live listing within 72 hours

phases.name: Setup and seller supply (week 1-2)
tasks: Configure Sharetribe marketplace with branding and categories
Set up Typeform seller application form
Onboard first 5 verified sellers and help them list products
Set up WhatsApp Business API for order notifications
phases.milestone: 5 verified sellers live with at least 20 products listed

phases.name: First buyers and validation (week 3-4)
tasks: Launch Instagram content (3 posts per week showcasing products)
Reach out to 10 university art clubs with free delivery offer
Run WhatsApp outreach to 30 known art-interested contacts
Collect feedback from every buyer via WhatsApp voice note
phases.milestone: 10 completed orders, 3 repeat buyers, seller NPS > 7

phases.name: Iterate and stabilise (week 5-8)
tasks: Fix top 3 friction points from buyer feedback
Onboard 5 more verified sellers based on demand gaps
Introduce featured listing fee for sellers who want visibility
Launch premium seller subscription to top 3 most active sellers
Set up Google Sheets seller analytics summary (monthly)
phases.milestone: 50 orders, $2,000 GMV, 2 sellers paying premium subscription

build_plan.total_timeline: 8 weeks from decision to first 50 orders

validation_experiments.hypothesis: 30 WhatsApp outreach messages to art students will generate 5+ completed purchases
validation_experiments.method: Manual DM with a product link and discount code for the first order

validation_experiments.hypothesis: Instagram product reels get 3%+ click-through to the marketplace
validation_experiments.method: Post 3 product showcase reels per week, track link-in-bio clicks
validation_experiments.success_metric: 3% CTR on at least 2 of 6 reels in weeks 3-4

validation_experiments.hypothesis: Local art supply sellers will list products faster with WhatsApp onboarding guidance than with email
validation_experiments.method: Onboard 5 sellers via WhatsApp voice guidance vs 5 via email only
validation_experiments.success_metric: WhatsApp-guided sellers list first product in under 48 hours vs 72+ hours for email

must_be_true: At least 5 verified sellers live with 20+ products
Local payment (Fawry or Mada) successfully tested end-to-end
WhatsApp order notification working for buyer and seller
At least 3 real buyers have completed a purchase without founder assistance
No checkout bugs in mobile browser testing on Android and iOS
kill_criteria: Fewer than 5 orders after 6 weeks despite 50+ outreach conversations
More than 3 sellers leave after onboarding citing platform quality concerns
Payment failure rate > 30% on local payment methods after 2 fix attempts

testing_plan.method: Have 5 beta buyers complete a real purchase on mobile and desktop
testing_plan.pass_criteria: Zero blocking errors, order confirmed via WhatsApp within 5 minutes

testing_plan.method: Test Fawry, Mada, and card payment with real transactions (small amounts)
testing_plan.pass_criteria: All three methods process successfully; no transaction errors

testing_plan.method: Founder completes the seller onboarding as a test account
testing_plan.pass_criteria: First product listed within 30 minutes of receiving Sharetribe login

testing_plan.method: Place 5 test orders and verify notification delivery time
testing_plan.pass_criteria: Notification arrives within 3 minutes of order placement

qa_checklist: Marketplace loads correctly on Chrome, Safari, and Firefox mobile
Product images display correctly at different resolutions
Seller verified badge appears on all seller profile pages
Fawry payment completes without error and triggers WhatsApp notification
Mada payment completes without error and triggers WhatsApp notification
Buyer receives order confirmation within 3 minutes
Seller receives new order notification within 3 minutes
Typeform seller application submits successfully and sends confirmation email
Search and filter by category returns correct results
Out-of-stock products show correctly and cannot be added to cart
first_100_users_plan: Weeks 1-4: manual outreach — 30 WhatsApp DMs to known art students plus 10 university art club partnerships. Weeks 5-8: Instagram content (3 posts/week) targeting MENA art hashtags plus 2 Instagram paid posts at $25 each. Goal: 100 registered buyers by end of week 8, 25% making at least one purchase.
summary: The MVP scope is tight — 5 core functions in 8 weeks using only no-code tools at under $130/month. The three riskiest assumptions (buyer willingness to pay, seller supply, and local payment completion) all have specific kill signals so the founder knows when to pivot instead of continuing to invest. Launch criteria are binary and measurable. The first 100 users plan is manual and low-cost, validating organic channels before spending on paid acquisition.
